tagline: Dashboard card of the latest few activity items with a "View all" link.
whenToUse: Use Recent Activity as a dashboard widget that surfaces the most recent handful of events (≤5 by default, no day grouping) inside a card, with a "View all" link to the full log. Reach for the full Activity Feed on a dedicated page when you need grouping, paging, and the complete stream. Pair Recent Activity with Metric Card and Quick Links to compose a home dashboard.
